subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O Lord of existence and King of the seen and unseen! I beseech Thee by this Day wherein hath shone forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا مالک الوجود و ملیک الغیب و الشهود اسئلک بهذا الیوم الذی فیه اشرقت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for justice and fairmindedness, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @suffering and imprisonment
